a.xlink:title: customer_db.party Generic party record owned by customer-service.
customer_db.natural_person Natural person details for a party.
customer_db.customer Bank customer aggregate persisted by customer-service.
customer_db.identification_document Identity documents associated with a party.
customer_db.contact_point Contact channels associated with a party.
customer_db.address Addresses associated with a party.
customer_db.kyc_profile KYC profile associated with a customer.
customer_db.customer_status_history Audit trail for customer status transitions.
customer_db.customer_number_sequence Local sequence used to generate customer numbers.
customer_db.customer_idempotency Durable customer creation idempotency reservation. resource_id is assigned atomically after creation.
account_db.account Bank account aggregate persisted by account-service.
account_db.account_balance Current balance state for an account.
account_db.account_status_history Audit trail for account status transitions.
account_db.account_number_sequence Local sequence used to generate account numbers.
account_db.account_idempotency Durable account opening idempotency reservation. resource_id is assigned atomically after creation.
identity_db.identity_link External identity to banking customer link persisted by identity-service.

notification_db.notification Notification delivery audit persisted by notification-service. Sensitive variables and rendered bodies are redacted; request_fingerprint binds exact idempotent replays without retaining the payload.
document_db.document Document metadata and object storage location persisted by document-service. The optional idempotency key and content hash make upload retries safe.
onboarding_db.onboarding_application Digital onboarding application state persisted by onboarding-service.
onboarding_db.onboarding_magic_link_delivery Transactional outbox payload. Ciphertext is cleared after terminal delivery handling.
onboarding_db.onboarding_email_request_guard Serializes application starts and enforces the enumeration-safe email cooldown.
onboarding_db.onboarding_credential_invitation_delivery Durable credential invitation delivery intent with idempotency, retry scheduling, and lease-based claiming.
